name: Zoe

conquest.name: Shield Strike
conquest.description: Zoe's unpredictable attacks easily enweb foes, dealing damage every 0.5 seconds and amplifying damage taken by the target for 2 seconds.
conquest.wording_conflict_note: kingshot-data listed 5th tier amp as 25%; kingshotwiki says 30%. Using 30% per kingshotwiki standard escalation pattern.

conquest.name: Agony Rush
conquest.description: Zoe requires pain to reach peak physical performance. Zoe immediately regains max Health when Health drops below 50%. Can only activate once per battle.

conquest.name: Holy Might
conquest.description: Zoe inspires her fellow warriors to battle, boosting your heroes' Attack Speed.

expedition.name: Sundering Wound
expedition.description: Your squads' attacks gain a 20% chance of inflicting Sunder, dealing damage per turn for 3 turns.

expedition.name: Stoic
expedition.description: Zoe is a gifted female orator, and her rousing battle speeches increase the total Squads' Attack.

expedition.name: Infinite Arsenal
expedition.description: Your squads' attacks gain a 50% chance of amplifying enemy squads' damage taken.

skills.talent_note: No Talent skill found. 8-skill pattern like Jabel/Saul.

exclusive_gear_skills.name: Death or Glory
exclusive_gear_skills.description: Zoe's inner demon is awakened only by pain. Gains increased Attack until the end of battle once Agony Rush is triggered. Unlocked only when The Unrighteous is equipped.

exclusive_gear_skills.name: Dark Lady
exclusive_gear_skills.description: Zoe is a relentlessly demanding garrison commander, increasing Defender Squads' Attack. Unlocked only when The Unrighteous is equipped.

order: Max Shield Strike first (Attack×84% per 0.5s, amplifies enemy damage taken by 30%)
Then Agony Rush (40% Health regain under 50% HP for survivability)
Then Holy Might (+7% Attack Speed for heroes)
Expedition: Dark Lady (+15% Defender Squads Attack)
skill_priority.reasoning: No source provides Zoe's upgrade order.

gear_recommendations.reasoning: Standard infantry archetype at legendary tier. Derived from community gear build templates (allclash.com Zoe guide as canonical base for infantry, confirmed by community consensus across allclash, heaven-guardian, kingshothandbook build guides).
sources: allclash.com Zoe build guide (canonical infantry template)

lineup_inferences.note: Zoe joins Jabel as the garrison core. Agony Rush + Death or Glory gives her comeback potential.

best_partners.theoretical_synergy: Zoe pairs naturally with Hilde (healer) — Hilde's heals plus Zoe's self-regen via Agony Rush creates an extremely hard-to-kill defensive core. Her exclusive gear Death or Glory unlocks major damage boost once Agony Rush fires, rewarding compositions that let her take damage early.
best_partners.source: kingshotguides.com + lootbar.gg + kingshotmastery.com (community consensus lineup guides)

counters.reason: No public source documents explicit hero-vs-hero counter matchups for Kingshot. Community discussions reference troop-type rock-paper-scissors (Infantry > Cavalry > Archer > Infantry) and formation-based counters but not specific hero counters. Check Discord/Reddit for player-tested matchups.

f2p_investment.reasoning: Zoe is THE F2P garrison MVP. Community guides consistently recommend her as the defensive cornerstone for free players from Gen 2 onward. 4 F2P access methods confirmed.

rally.reasoning: Not a rally lead. Her kit is entirely defensive.

garrison.reasoning: The F2P garrison MVP. Remains viable well into Gen 5-6 with proper support. Shield Strike's damage amplification debuff plus Agony Rush's self-heal plus Infinite Arsenal's enemy damage amplification make her a defensive powerhouse that scales well into late game. Her defensive capabilities, damage reduction, and crowd control are unmatched for free players.

bear_hunt.reasoning: Not typically used in bear hunt. Defensive kit doesn't translate to the offensive coordination bear hunt rewards.

joiner.reasoning: Not typically used as a joiner.

lore_background.title: The Rainbow Lady of the Unjust League
lore_background.backstory: Zoe's emotional states manifest through her magical hair — black signifying patience, yellow reflecting exhilaration. Raised north of Noxholm in poverty, she witnessed nobility's cruelty and the betrayals of her own family. Adopted into the Unjust League alongside Amadeus, she became determined to gain power to reshape society according to her beliefs. She's infamous at the Adventurers' Camp as a top troublemaker, yet respected as a multi-time 'Best Vanguard Captain' — the kind of dangerous, beautiful, principled outlaw whose presence is itself a threat to unjust order.
lore_background.personality_trait: defiant, principled, color-coded emotions, reshaping-society ambition
lore_background.thematic_quote: The lady is like a rainbow — you only believe such beauty exists when you see it.
lore_background.cross_reference: Adopted into the Unjust League alongside Amadeus — shared faction. Both are outlaws by the powerful's standards, justice-seekers by their own.

deep_analysis: Zoe is the F2P garrison backbone — the Gen 2 Legendary Infantry hero whose defensive kit scales from early game all the way into Gen 5-6 meta. Her Conquest kit is built around surviving and punishing attackers: Shield Strike deals up to Attack × 84% every 0.5 seconds while amplifying the target's damage-taken by up to 30% for 2 seconds, Agony Rush regenerates up to 40% of her max Health when her HP drops below 50% (once per battle), and Holy Might passively adds +7% Attack Speed. Her Expedition tree spreads that pain across the whole army: Sundering Wound gives squads a 20% chance to apply a 3-turn bleed dealing up to 40% per turn, Stoic buffs squad Attack by up to 25%, and Infinite Arsenal gives squads a 50% chance to amplify enemy damage taken by up to 50%. Her exclusive gear The Unrighteous adds +60% Lethality and +60% Health (highest percentages on Gen 1-2 gear documented) plus +414 Attack, +540 Defense, +8100 Health at max level, and unlocks two more skills: Death or Glory (up to +24% Attack triggered by Agony Rush firing, creating a comeback mechanic) and Dark Lady (up to +15% Attack for Defender Troops). Community tier lists put her at S-tier Garrison — the F2P cornerstone alongside Jabel, available through Hero Roulette, Hall of Heroes, Daily Deals, and Mythic General Hero Shard. Her lore: a noble-hating orator from the slums north of Noxholm, adopted into the Unjust League alongside Amadeus, her magical hair shifting color with her moods — black for patience, yellow for exhilaration. The community calls her 'the lady like a rainbow — you only believe such beauty exists when you see it.'
unverified_fields: skills.conquest.Shield Strike 5th tier amp — minor conflict resolved (25% kingshot-data vs 30% kingshotwiki, used 30%)

handbook_meta.description: Zoe represents the single most important hero investment decision for F2P players. Unlike other Gen 2 heroes who get replaced by Gen 3-4 equivalents, Zoe has no direct F2P replacement through Generation 5. Her 40% HP heal, +60% widget bonuses, and nearly double Jabel's base Health make her irreplaceable.

effect_op_codes.description: Gen 2 F2P infantry tank widget — unique 40% HP heal
